title: RuOK
description: Provides a simple and practical optimization mod.
body:
"RuOK is a simple optimization mod that offers straightforward and practical client optimizations along with various functionalities and solutions.

Functionalities:
1. Rendering Optimization: This mod limits the number of entities within a specified range and dynamically adjusts the rendering entity positions based on the player's location. This helps reduce the load on your computer, providing a smoother gaming experience in areas with more entities.

2. Auto Graphics Adjustment: This feature assesses and adjusts global graphics settings based on your FPS, CPU, and RAM usage, eliminating the need for manual configuration.

3. Global Graphics Presets: Choose from presets like Ultra, High, Medium, Low, and Ultra-Low to instantly adjust particle effects, graphics, and other settings without the hassle of manual adjustments.

Additional features can be explored upon installing the mod, with ongoing development for more functionalities...

Real-life Impact:
In a large sky island mod, a noticeable optimization occurred when rapidly right-clicking dirt to gather a large number of stones. The framerate significantly improved from an unstable 14 frames per second to a stable 52 frames per second."
